site.name: Grok Demo
site.description: Talk to the world's most powerful AI — right here, right now.

index.title: Grok Demo — Built by Grok with Forma
index.description: A fully functional ChatGPT-style interface built 100% with Forma. No hallucinated CSS. Just intent + blocks + judge.

blocks.title: The AI that actually listens.
blocks.subtitle: Instant, intelligent chat. Built with 31 semantic tokens and 32 reusable blocks. Zero design drift.

blocks.section_subtitle: Same power as ChatGPT, now built with perfect design contracts.
blocks.feature_1_description: Ask anything. Get thoughtful replies in seconds.
blocks.feature_2_description: Write, debug, and explain code instantly.
blocks.feature_3_description: Brainstorm ideas, write stories, or generate images.

blocks.title: The manifest behind this demo
blocks.subtitle: This entire page was declared in JSON. No HTML written. No CSS invented.

blocks.testimonial_1_quote: Finally an AI interface that looks as good as it thinks.
blocks.testimonial_2_quote: The manifest-to-page pipeline is exactly what agent workflows needed. Ship once, theme forever.
blocks.testimonial_3_quote: I changed one line in the manifest and the entire site re-themed. That is how design systems should work.

blocks.title: Start a conversation with AI
blocks.subtitle: This entire page was built by declaring intent — not writing HTML.

blocks.legal_text: 2026. Built with Forma. Contract-first. Agent-native. Built by Grok using Forma.
